/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/sensors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/telemetry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/navigation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/car_electric/ignition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/ci_electric/power.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenPilot.dir/src/lua_engine.cpp.o -o OpenPilot  /opt/homebrew/opt/lua@5.4/lib/liblua.dylib
